mission.title: ollama: AMD GPU & ROCm support
mission.description: AMD GPU & ROCm support. Requested by 61+ users.

steps.title: Check current Ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your Ollama version:
```bash
ollama version
```
This feature requires Ollama with AMD ROCm support.

steps.title: Review AMD GPU and ROCm requirements
steps.description:
Ollama supports AMD GPUs via ROCm. Requirements:
- AMD GPU with ROCm support (e.g., RX 7900 XT, RX 6800, etc.)
- ROCm drivers installed on the host system
- For Docker: use the `ollama/ollama:rocm` image tag

Check if ROCm is available:
```bash
rocminfo 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "ROCm not installed"
```

steps.title: Run Ollama with AMD GPU support
steps.description:
For native installation, Ollama auto-detects AMD GPUs with ROCm drivers.

For Docker with AMD GPU:
```bash
docker run -d \
  --device /dev/kfd \
  --device /dev/dri \
  -v ollama:/root/.ollama \
  -p 11434:11434 \
  --name ollama \
  ollama/ollama:rocm
```

Verify GPU detection:
```bash
ollama ps
```

steps.title: Verify AMD GPU acceleration works
steps.description:
Run a model and check that it uses the GPU:
```bash
ollama run llama3 "Hello, world!"
```
Check the Ollama logs for GPU detection messages confirming ROCm library loading.

resolution.summary: AMD GPU acceleration via ROCm is now supported in Ollama. Users can run models on AMD GPUs either natively (with ROCm drivers) or via Docker using the ollama/ollama:rocm image.

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
